claimText: UCLA DTS guidance says users may not input FERPA-protected student information, HIPPA/HIPAA-protected health data, employee personnel/performance data, unpublished research/IP/grant proposals, or export-controlled or restricted data into AI tools unless explicitly approved in a secure environment.
normalizedValue: Restricted data categories may not be input into AI tools unless explicitly approved in a secure environment.

citation.sourceRights: Official source retains original rights. Tracker metadata is open licensed; source text is quoted only as short evidence.
